column1: # lm22 — illustrative subset of the CIBERSORT LM22 panel (Newman et al.,
# Nat Methods 2015. doi:10.1038/nmeth.3337). Partial curation: a handful of
# well-known marker genes per cell type, intended as a baseline for the v1
# panel-aggregation infrastructure rather than a faithful LM22 replacement.
# Replace via `--panels-tsv <path>` for full LM22 weights.
# Empty gene_id is fine; matching falls back to gene_symbol against the GTF
# `gene_name` attribute. Weight is informational; the v1 aggregator counts
# reads per (panel, cell_type) and ignores weight (reserved for future use).
